profile.name: Live Monitoring
profile.description: Faster refresh profile for active crawler watching.

red_ring_semantics.is_sanctioned_node: red marker ring and SANCTIONED badge
red_ring_semantics.is_policy_restricted_node: red-orange marker ring and RESTRICTED badge

osm_hot.name: OpenStreetMap Humanitarian
osm_hot.attribution: © OpenStreetMap contributors, Tiles style by HOT

sanctioned-node.label: Sanctioned / Restricted Nation Node
sanctioned-node.description: Node is marked by the local sanctioned-jurisdiction policy classifier. Red ring is mandatory.

policy-restricted-node.label: Policy Restricted Node
policy-restricted-node.description: Node is marked by local policy restriction rules. Red-orange ring is mandatory.

high-threat-infrastructure.label: Confirmed / High Threat Infrastructure
high-threat-infrastructure.description: Defensive threat-infrastructure correlation or explicit trusted intelligence match. Not country-to-APT attribution.

confirmed-threat.label: Confirmed Intelligence Match
confirmed-threat.description: Explicit trusted intelligence-feed or confirmed source-metadata match.

duplicate-location.label: Duplicate IP / Multiple Nodes at Location
duplicate-location.description: Two or more advertised nodes share the same rounded map coordinate.

became-unreachable.label: Node Became Unreachable
became-unreachable.description: Node was previously known but failed the latest reachability check.

unreachable.label: Unreachable
unreachable.description: Node failed the latest reachability check.

not-yet-synced.label: Not Yet Synced
not-yet-synced.description: Node reports a block height below the current observed chain tip.

reachable-now.label: Reachable Now
reachable-now.description: Node was reachable in the latest crawl.

reachable-24h.label: Reachable Within 24H
reachable-24h.description: Node was seen during the 24-hour rolling window.

stable-1w-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 1 Week
stable-1w-plus.description: Node is synced with more than one week of observed uptime.

stable-48h-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 48h
stable-48h-plus.description: Node is synced with more than forty-eight hours of observed uptime.

synced-10m-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 10m
synced-10m-plus.description: Node is synced with more than ten minutes of observed uptime.

synced-under-10m.label: Synced / Uptime Less Than 10m
synced-under-10m.description: Node appears synced but has less than ten minutes of observed uptime.

synced.label: Synced
synced.description: Node appears reachable/synced without enough uptime metadata for a higher tier.

unknown.label: Unknown / Unclassified
unknown.description: Node does not yet have enough telemetry for reliable classification.

tor.label: Tor Node
tor.description: Node is reachable through the Tor onion overlay network.

i2p.label: I2P Node
i2p.description: Node is reachable through the I2P overlay network.

dns.label: DNS Hostname Node
dns.description: Hostname endpoint whose resolved address family was not carried into this vector record.

unknown.label: Unknown Network
unknown.description: Network family could not be classified.

suspected-vpn.label: VPN / Suspected VPN Node
suspected-vpn.description: Node is associated with VPN-like provider, ASN, or heuristic signals.

suspected-proxy.label: Proxy / Suspected Proxy Node
suspected-proxy.description: Node is associated with proxy-like provider, ASN, or heuristic signals.

datacenter.label: Datacenter / Hosting / Cloud
datacenter.description: Hosting, VPS, cloud, CDN, colocation, or datacenter network.

government.label: Government Network
government.description: Government-associated organization, ASN, domain, or classifier hit.

military.label: Military / Defense Network
military.description: Military, defense, or armed-forces-associated network classification.

threat-actor-label.label: Explicit Threat Actor Label
threat-actor-label.description: Actor/group label surfaced only from trusted metadata or feed fields.

known-malactor.label: Known Malactor
known-malactor.description: Node matched a local known-malactor intelligence list.

public.label: Public / Residential / Civilian
public.description: Ordinary public internet, residential, or civilian node classification.

private.label: Private Company / Commercial Network
private.description: Commercial, enterprise, hosting, or privately operated network.

government.label: Government
government.description: Government-associated organization, ASN, domain, or classification match.

military.label: Military / Defense
military.description: Military, defense, or armed-forces-associated network classification.

university.label: University / Academia / Institute
university.description: Academic, research institute, university, or educational network classification.

datacenter.label: Datacenter / Hosting / Cloud
datacenter.description: Hosting, cloud, VPS, CDN, colocation, or datacenter network.

ngo.label: NGO / Nonprofit / Civic Institution
ngo.description: Nonprofit, civic, foundation, or public-interest institutional network.

red_ring_semantics.is_sanctioned_node: red marker ring and SANCTIONED table badge
red_ring_semantics.is_policy_restricted_node: red-orange marker ring and RESTRICTED table badge
red_ring_semantics.confirmed_or_high_threat: red marker/ring and THREAT/CONFIRMED table badge

layers.label: All Nodes
layers.description: Every geocoded Bitcoin node loaded from the selected source.

layers.description: IPv6 Bitcoin node endpoints.

layers.description: CJDNS/fc00::/8 IPv6 Bitcoin node endpoints.

layers.label: Tor Nodes
layers.description: Onion nodes displayed at the symbolic overlay coordinate channel.

layers.label: I2P Nodes
layers.description: I2P nodes displayed at the symbolic overlay coordinate channel.

layers.label: VPN / Suspected VPN
layers.description: Nodes flagged by local VPN heuristics or provider intelligence.

layers.label: Proxy / Suspected Proxy
layers.description: Nodes flagged by local proxy heuristics or proxy intelligence.

layers.label: Datacenter / Hosting
layers.description: Nodes associated with hosting, VPS, cloud, CDN, or datacenter networks.

layers.label: Government
layers.description: Nodes associated with government networks by local classification rules.

layers.label: Military
layers.description: Nodes associated with military networks by local classification rules.

layers.label: University / Academic
layers.description: Nodes associated with academic, university, institute, or research networks.

layers.label: Sanctioned Nation Nodes
layers.description: Nodes flagged by local sanctioned-nation policy classification. These are circled in red on the map and table views.

layers.label: Policy Restricted Nodes
layers.description: Nodes flagged by local policy-restricted jurisdiction classification. These are circled red-orange on the map and table views.

layers.label: Threat Infrastructure
layers.description: Nodes classified by defensive threat-infrastructure correlation. This is not country-to-APT attribution.

layers.label: Confirmed Intelligence Match
layers.description: Nodes with explicit trusted intelligence-feed match or confirmed source metadata.

layers.label: Threat Actor Group Label
layers.description: Nodes with explicit threat actor/group labels from trusted metadata or feed correlation only.

layers.label: Known Malactor
layers.description: Nodes matched by local known-malactor intelligence.

layers.label: Duplicate Locations
layers.description: Multiple nodes sharing the same rounded map coordinate.

layers.label: Unreachable
layers.description: Nodes that failed the latest reachability check.

layers.label: Not Yet Synced
layers.description: Nodes reporting below-tip block height.

layers.label: Synced
layers.description: Synced nodes without higher uptime classification.

layers.label: Synced 10m+
layers.description: Synced nodes with observed uptime over 10 minutes.

layers.label: Stable 48h+
layers.description: Synced nodes with observed uptime over 48 hours.

layers.label: Stable 1w+
layers.description: Synced nodes with observed uptime over 1 week.

layers.label: Clusters
layers.description: Rounded-coordinate aggregate clusters for wide zoom levels.

layers.label: Heatmap
layers.description: Weighted map intensity surface from node concentration and telemetry priority.

layers.label: Unknown
layers.description: Nodes with incomplete or ambiguous telemetry.

overlays.label: Legend
overlays.description: Color, status, sanctions, and threat marker legend.

overlays.label: Telemetry HUD
overlays.description: Live map counters and network category totals.

overlays.label: Security HUD
overlays.description: Sanctions, policy, defensive threat-infrastructure, and explicit actor-label counters.

payload.title: Security / Policy HUD
payload.warning: Threat layers are defensive infrastructure/feed correlations. Actor labels require explicit trusted metadata.

overlays.label: Network Filter
overlays.description: IPv4, IPv6, CJDNS, Tor, I2P, and unknown network filters.

overlays.label: Status Filter
overlays.description: Sync, uptime, duplicate, and unknown status filters.

overlays.label: Security / Policy Filter
overlays.description: Sanctioned, restricted, threat, actor-label, and known-malactor filters.

overlays.label: Source Badge
overlays.description: Selected crawler source and map build metadata.

payload.title: Sanctions / Policy Watch
payload.note: Sanctioned nodes are clearly marked with a red map ring and SANCTIONED table badge.

overlays.label: Threat Badge
overlays.description: Defensive threat infrastructure and trusted feed correlation summary.

payload.title: Threat Infrastructure Correlation
payload.warning: This overlay does not infer APT attribution from country, ASN, provider, VPN/proxy/Tor/I2P usage, or hosting status alone.

overlays.label: Tor Atlantic Channel
overlays.description: Symbolic Atlantic plotting channel for Onion network nodes.

payload.label: Tor Atlantic Channel
payload.note: Overlay-network nodes are intentionally plotted to a symbolic ocean channel because physical attribution is limited.

overlays.label: I2P Indian Ocean Channel
overlays.description: Symbolic Indian Ocean plotting channel for I2P nodes.

payload.label: I2P Indian Ocean Channel
payload.note: Overlay-network nodes are intentionally plotted to a symbolic ocean channel because physical attribution is limited.

overlays.label: Heatmap Overlay
overlays.description: Weighted density overlay for node concentration.

overlays.label: Cluster Overlay
overlays.description: Zoom-level cluster overlays generated from rounded coordinates.

overlays.label: Attribution
overlays.description: Map tile, engine, data caution, and project attribution.

payload.title: Map Attribution
payload.data_warning: Geo/security overlays are enrichment and policy classification outputs, not legal or intelligence determinations.

red_ring_semantics.sanctions_badge: sanctioned nodes are red-ringed and table-badged
red_ring_semantics.threat_badge: confirmed/high threat infrastructure receives red or threat marker emphasis

parcels.note: Parcel IDs are deterministic synthetic coordinate/context buckets unless official parcel reference data is supplied.

buildings.location_confidence_note: Building footprints are best-effort IP geolocation/rendering approximations. They may indicate a registered address, ISP PoP, datacenter, corporate office, or regional geolocation centroid.

w3w_addresses.note: what3words values may be official API results, local cache results, or local fallback grid values depending on enrichment source.

zzxgcs_addresses.note: ZZX-GCS values may be official ZZX-GCS list results, private-repo wordlist results, cached values, or deterministic local fallback values.

geohashids.note: GeoHashID values are deterministic local geohash buckets derived from available coordinates or enrichment cache records.
